title: pterophylla bojeriana
intro: Pterophylla bojeriana, also known as the 'umbrella tree', is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is native to Madagascar and is a climbing vine with large, compound leaves. Pterophylla bojeriana has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, skin infections, and respiratory problems, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts.
